commands.review_summary:
The PR writes generated Windows node guidance into the WSL workspace `TOOLS.md` during CLI setup and adds SetupEngine tests for the Markdown and base64 write command.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds generated setup guidance rather than reporting a broken existing behavior. The relevant check is source review of the generated Markdown and write command.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is no narrow automated repair to queue; the remaining action is maintainer review of the draft and confirmation of the gateway CLI guidance text.

target.title: Add Windows node guidance to setup TOOLS.md
target.body:
## Summary
- write Windows node guidance into the WSL OpenClaw workspace `TOOLS.md` during setup
- keep the shell write robust by base64-decoding the generated Markdown inside WSL
- cover the generated guidance and write command with SetupEngine tests

## Validation
- `dotnet test .\tests\OpenClaw.SetupEngine.Tests\OpenClaw.SetupEngine.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~InstallCli" --no-restore`
- `.\build.ps1`
- `dotnet test .\tests\OpenClaw.Shared.Tests\OpenClaw.Shared.Tests.csproj --no-restore`
- `dotnet test .\tests\OpenClaw.Tray.Tests\OpenClaw.Tray.Tests.csproj --no-restore`
- end-to-end local setup completed successfully; gateway running and `~/.openclaw/workspace/TOOLS.md` verified in WSL
target.author: ranjeshj
